# Home {.unnumbered}

OPALX is an open-source, exascale-ready, performance-portable accelerator simulation framework.

The OPALX Physics Manual collects the underlying theory, numerical models, and
benchmark problems used throughout the code base.

Here you can find the [OPALX User Manual](https://opalx-project.github.io/Manual-new/).

The source code is maintained in [OPALX's Git repository](https://github.com/OPALX-project/OPALX).
The locally built [OPALX Doxygen API](api/opalx/html/index.html) is published
with this manual for source-level cross references.
